title: Wanneng Lian Ai Zahuo Dian

synonyms: Wan Neng Lian Ai Za Huo Dian

synopsis:
Magical store manager Shu uses various fantasy love props to help humans solve problems about love, but is pursued and investigated by a stoic sheriff for ten nights. There are not only tense and exciting "cat and mouse games", robust imaginations, and fashionable and interesting art designs, but also hot and interesting topics about love! Love Magic Grocery is looking forward to your arrival~

(Source: iQIYI International)
